meaning: n.[希神][罗神]马头鱼尾的怪兽,[鱼]海马
examples: This also decreased neurogenesis in the hippocampus.
The hippocampus contributes to conscious memory.
As part of normal aging, the hippocampus shrinks.
One is complex forms of memory, which require the hippocampus and (are called) explicit memory storage.
Sleep-deprived gamers, who still relied on the hippocampus, had to think harder about their virtual navigation.
